classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

verses.text: Synod against the heresy of Pelagius and Celestius.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: In the consulate of the most glorious Emperors, Honorius for the XIIth time and Theodosius for the VIIIth, Augusti most exalted, on the Calends of May, at Carthage in the secretarium of the Basilica of Faustus.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: When Aurelius the bishop presided over the whole council, the deacons standing by, it pleased all the bishops, whose names and subscriptions are indicated, met together in the holy synod of the Church of Carthage to define—
